description: Abyssal Depths Patch 6 (6 October 2025) — Season 27 Winner Statues Unveiled, Changes, Combat Balance Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: Changes

items.text: The World Map, Region Map, and Minimap now uniformly display the region name, zone type, and region tier
Player, guild, and alliance names can now be clicked in most UIs to open their details menus

sections.searchable_text: Changes The World Map, Region Map, and Minimap now uniformly display the region name, zone type, and region tier Player, guild, and alliance names can now be clicked in most UIs to open their details menus

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes

subsections.heading: Arcane Staffs
subsections.description: Magic Shock’s range has been increased to better function as a long-range, low-commitment interrupt option.
subsections.searchable_text: Arcane Staffs Magic Shock’s range has been increased to better function as a long-range, low-commitment interrupt option. Magic Shock (all Arcane Staffs) Range: 13m → 14m

subsections.heading: Bows
subsections.description: Enchanted Quiver’s damage bonus with enemy players near melee range has been reduced to give opponents a more effective counterplay option.

subitems.text: Damage bonus if an enemy player is within 6m: 235% → 220%

stats.name: Damage bonus if an enemy player is within 6m

subitems.text: Added: Slow no longer applies diminishing returns (still reduced by existing diminishing returns)

subsections.searchable_text: Bows Enchanted Quiver’s damage bonus with enemy players near melee range has been reduced to give opponents a more effective counterplay option. Enchanted Quiver (Bow) Damage bonus if an enemy player is within 6m: 235% → 220% Multishot (all Bows) Damage: 127 → 116 Added: Slow no longer applies diminishing returns (still reduced by existing diminishing returns)

subsections.heading: Daggers
subsections.description: Deathgivers have been slightly too powerful in 1v1 content, so their damage output has been reduced slightly to help alternatives compete.
subsections.searchable_text: Daggers Deathgivers have been slightly too powerful in 1v1 content, so their damage output has been reduced slightly to help alternatives compete. Ghost Strike (Deathgivers) Damage: 159 → 153

subsections.heading: Fire Staffs
subsections.description: Combustion has received another small buff to its fear duration for both the initial target, and to enemies who walk into its flame trail.
subsections.searchable_text: Fire Staffs Combustion has received another small buff to its fear duration for both the initial target, and to enemies who walk into its flame trail. Combustion (Infernal Staff) Fear duration: 1.25s → 1.5s Spontaneous Combustion (Flamewalker Staff) Impact damage: 200 → 189

subsections.heading: Frost Staffs
subsections.description: The Frostbite Charge duration has been increased to give users a slightly longer window to aim and line up a stun.
subsections.searchable_text: Frost Staffs The Frostbite Charge duration has been increased to give users a slightly longer window to aim and line up a stun. Frostbite (all Frost Staffs) Frostbite Charge duration: 2.5s → 3s

subsections.heading: Hammers
subsections.description: Groundbreaker hasn’t felt like it has a clear identity for a while. To give Polehammer more of a role, its range has been increased significantly, allowing Polehammer players to safely stun enemies even beyond territory walls.
subsections.searchable_text: Hammers Groundbreaker hasn’t felt like it has a clear identity for a while. To give Polehammer more of a role, its range has been increased significantly, allowing Polehammer players to safely stun enemies even beyond territory walls. Groundbreaker (Polehammer) Range: 16m → 20m Giant Steps (Forge Hammers) Armor: 0.2 → 0.30 Magic Resistance: 0.35 → 0.30

subsections.heading: Quarterstaffs
subsections.description: Consecutive casts no longer delete existing areas, making it possible to cover more area with Phantom Twins. Stacking two areas will not deal double damage, however, so it’s still better to maximize area uptime.

subitems.text: New: Recasting no longer removes existing areas

subsections.searchable_text: Quarterstaffs Consecutive casts no longer delete existing areas, making it possible to cover more area with Phantom Twins. Stacking two areas will not deal double damage, however, so it’s still better to maximize area uptime. Phantom Twin (Phantom Twinblade) Multicast cooldown: 0s → 1s Multicast time window: 4s → 5s New: Recasting no longer removes existing areas

subsections.heading: Shapeshifter Staffs
subsections.description: Rootbound has been a dominant option in highly-coordinated 5v5 content, where players can time burst healing with the area, while larger groups prefer its up-front defensives. To shift power from 5v5 towards larger-scale content, its healing received buff has been replaced by a health increase.

subitems.text: Added 10% max and current health increase

subsections.searchable_text: Shapeshifter Staffs Rootbound has been a dominant option in highly-coordinated 5v5 content, where players can time burst healing with the area, while larger groups prefer its up-front defensives. To shift power from 5v5 towards larger-scale content, its healing received buff has been replaced by a health increase. Seedling's Bloom (Rootbound Staff) Removed 10% higher healing received Added 10% max and current health increase Serpent's Gaze (Stillgaze Staff) Enemy damage reduction: 80% → 70% Added 70% healing reduction Sylvian Transformation (Rootbound Staff) team hp increase: 10% → 8% Tether Shift (all Shapeshifter Staffs) Cooldown: 15s → 18s

subsections.heading: Spears
subsections.description: Similar to Multishot, Lunging Strike no longer reduces the slow duration for subsequent casts on the same target.

subitems.text: No longer applies diminishing returns (duration is still reduced by existing slow diminishing returns)

subsections.searchable_text: Spears Similar to Multishot, Lunging Strike no longer reduces the slow duration for subsequent casts on the same target. Lunging Strike (all Spears) No longer applies diminishing returns (duration is still reduced by existing slow diminishing returns)

subsections.heading: Armors
subsections.description: Mistwalker Jacket has been a standout defensive option from 1v1 all the way to the largest ZvZs. To open up more space for other armor options across the board, its cooldown has been increased.
subsections.searchable_text: Armors Mistwalker Jacket has been a standout defensive option from 1v1 all the way to the largest ZvZs. To open up more space for other armor options across the board, its cooldown has been increased. Mistcloud (Mistwalker Jacket) Cooldown: 45s → 50s

subsections.heading: Battle Mounts
subsections.description: While not a full solution to battle mount spam, the in-combat movement speed bonus of several mounts has been reduced so that battle mount riders are less likely to get away with poor or overly-aggressive positioning. In addition, to reduce the impact of spamming lower-tier mounts, their health has been reduced in many cases, but increased for higher-tier mounts to help justify risking them.

sections.heading: Fixes

subsections.heading: Spell Fixes

items.text: Serpent’s Gaze (Stillgaze Staff): Fixed issue where target would not be stunned correctly if hit while channeling
Dual Nature (Forgebark Staff): Fixed issue where targets with crowd control immunity could still sometimes be rooted
Swift Cut (Assassin Shoes): Fixed issue where damage would not be dealt to mounted players
Soulshaker (Grailseekers): Spell description now correctly states that cooldown is doubled after recasting
Blueflame Torch now increases Bonus Damage as intended

subsections.searchable_text: Spell Fixes Serpent’s Gaze (Stillgaze Staff): Fixed issue where target would not be stunned correctly if hit while channeling Dual Nature (Forgebark Staff): Fixed issue where targets with crowd control immunity could still sometimes be rooted Swift Cut (Assassin Shoes): Fixed issue where damage would not be dealt to mounted players Soulshaker (Grailseekers): Spell description now correctly states that cooldown is doubled after recasting Blueflame Torch now increases Bonus Damage as intended

subsections.heading: Other Fixes

items.text: Fixed issue where “Eat xx Fish” Albion Journal missions could be completed by casting spells while wearing fishing equipment

subsections.searchable_text: Other Fixes Fixed issue where “Eat xx Fish” Albion Journal missions could be completed by casting spells while wearing fishing equipment
